title: Activate HAR(RV) vol forecast in the vol-target denominator + cov diagonal
source: quant-phd-advisor re-review (2026-05-30) under the long-horizon + future-equity frame, verified against a reproduced full-history backtest (scripts/backtest_survival_book.py, 2000-01-03 -> 2026-05-29, 26.4y).
why: har_vol_forecast + _rescale_cov_to_vols + the vol_forecast path are implemented but OFF. Risk-officer DECOUPLED this from B0108: HAR's DE-RISK direction (tighter denominator -> shrink faster into vol spikes) is safe and ships INDEPENDENTLY of any cap decision; only HAR's lever-UP benefit is gated on B0108 (clipped while the cap binds). So this is a safe, near-zero-cost estimator improvement pre-B0108 and pre-B0112.
value_rationale: M: real but second-order; touches the denominator of the Sharpe (less noise-swamped than returns) and the survival-relevant de-risk direction. Near-zero implementation cost (already wired).
scope: Supply vol_forecast to compute_survival_target live + backtest.
A/B backtest: vol_forecast on vs None -> realized-vol tracking error, maxDD.

REPORT per-asset HAR forecast coverage: burn_in=252 daily RV obs means crypto (~4y, SOL ~1.4y) is NaN -> trailing-vol fallback for much of its history; the benefit is thin exactly where vol risk is highest.
Verify it does not worsen the crypto var-cap solve; rely on the where(notna) fallback.
recommendation: SAFE to ship pre-B0108/pre-B0112 for the de-risk direction. Lever-up benefit only realizes after B0108.
out_of_scope: GARCH (negligible over HAR at daily freq, more fragile).

history.reason: risk-officer: decouple HAR de-risk benefit from B0108 (no longer blocked_by)
risk-officer decouple: de-risk ships independently; lever-up gated
history.from: har_vol_forecast + _rescale_cov_to_vols + the vol_forecast path in compute_survival_target are already implemented but OFF (vol_forecast=None). A tighter one-step-ahead vol estimate (Corsi 2009) reduces realized-vs-target tracking error and, more importantly for survival, de-risks FASTER into vol spikes. NOTE: this is near a no-op while the 0.5x leverage cap binds 100% (B0108) -- a better forecast that asks for MORE exposure is clipped; only the de-risking direction always clears the cap. Hence gated on B0108.
history.to: har_vol_forecast + _rescale_cov_to_vols + the vol_forecast path are implemented but OFF. Risk-officer DECOUPLED this from B0108: HAR's DE-RISK direction (tighter denominator -> shrink faster into vol spikes) is safe and ships INDEPENDENTLY of any cap decision; only HAR's lever-UP benefit is gated on B0108 (clipped while the cap binds). So this is a safe, near-zero-cost estimator improvement pre-B0108 and pre-B0112.

from: Supply vol_forecast to compute_survival_target live + in backtest.
A/B backtest: vol_forecast on vs None -> realized-vol tracking error, maxDD; verify it does not worsen the crypto var-cap solve.
Confirm HAR availability per asset each cycle; rely on the existing where(notna) fallback to trailing vol for partial coverage (safe).

A/B backtest: vol_forecast on vs None -> realized-vol tracking error, maxDD.

REPORT per-asset HAR forecast coverage: burn_in=252 daily RV obs means crypto (~4y, SOL ~1.4y) is NaN -> trailing-vol fallback for much of its history; the benefit is thin exactly where vol risk is highest.
Verify it does not worsen the crypto var-cap solve; rely on the where(notna) fallback.
